sources.category: Hotel resort · Public Swimming Pool · Health/beauty · Exclusive Resort
sources.intro: Exclusive Resort — Sky Glass Indoor Pool. Dito hindi ka mangingitim.
sources.address: Blk 10 Lot 45 Phase 2 Congressville Subd. Brgy. Manggahan, Rodriguez, Rizal
sources.notes: About + Photos scraped logged-out via Chrome DevTools. No email on About. Indoor pool venue with night outdoor pool cover; tagline Dito hindi ka mangingitim. Cover, neon logo wall, indoor pool promo, guest gallery via signed fbcdn curl.

contact.name: Sky Glass
contact.address: Blk 10 Lot 45 Phase 2 Congressville Subd. Brgy. Manggahan, Rodriguez, Rizal

system.label: Venue booking & calendar admin
system.painHero: Indoor-pool day bookings and night staycations stack up on Messenger — see which slots are open without double-booking the glass house.

quotation.packageScope: One-page responsive indoor-pool resort site only (amenities, gallery, packages, FAQ, contact). Admin preview is a sample; production booking system priced separately.
quotation.paymentTerms: 50% upfront to begin · 50% on delivery (not the full amount upfront)

outreach.notes: No email on Facebook About. Reach via Messenger / SMS 0927 578 8947. Ask before any send.
